name: Context-Aware Loan Application
process_description: The loan application process begins when a customer submits a loan request in the online portal. A loan officer reviews the application. The credit assessment team performs a credit check. The risk department evaluates the applicant profile. A senior manager makes the final decision. If approved, the disbursement team releases the funds and notifies the customer.
simulation_goal: Reduce loan decision cycle time while maintaining responsive service across customer segments and priority levels
